human_verification.notes: Reviewed boundary controls, research-backed source policy, learner-study workflow handling, and scenario-to-ability coverage for campus administration.

review_notes: Scenario coverage validates administrative boundaries, evidence gating, and escalation to adjacent specialists.
All required education-and-research source classes are represented with source policy metadata.
No required research-ambiguity blockers remain for this validated package.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary decisions explicitly separate campus administration from grading, ethics, legal, and financial outcomes.
Research-backed source classes and refresh policy support jurisdiction-aware evidence handling.
Scenario suite covers missing evidence, conflicts, consent/access issues, tenant adaptation, and escalation.
notes: The lane remains `specification-based`; retained implementation is not claimed in this pack.
